case_title: MELBA CAJINA VS. WILLIAM S LO

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-15-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-15-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-18-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-09-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ENRIQUE RAMIREZ, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-15-2008 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-30-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARIA LERTORA, CSR#11935. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAJINA, MELBA AS TO DEFENDANT LO, WILLIAM S SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-09-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-07-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-24-2008
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF CAJINA, MELBA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
MOTION TO RESCIND SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAJINA, MELBA
